summary: `auth login --device` mints a fresh session authToken from device credentials (partnerUserID+partnerUserSecret) via the Authenticate command, and the client auto-refreshes on jsonCode 407 when those creds are configured.
reason: New Expensify (NewDot) keeps its live session in IndexedDB, not the www.expensify.com authToken cookie that --from-chrome reads — so the cookie is a stale classic-session token and 407s. Minting from device creds (the same mechanism the app uses) plus auto-refresh keeps the CLI working without manual re-auth.
validated_outcome: auth login --device against a mock Authenticate persists the minted token and doctor reports configured; real Authenticate returns jsonCode 200 for these device creds.
